data.company: AI Lab, University of South Dakota
details: Develop explainable AI models to improve interpretability and adversarial robustness of deep neural networks.
Design and evaluate defense strategies against adversarial attacks using gradient-based explanation techniques including Grad-CAM.
Conduct experiments on medical imaging datasets to build reliable and trustworthy AI models for clinical decision support.
Publish peer-reviewed research in top-tier AI conferences, Q1 Journals and workshops.
Assist and guide undergraduate students in learning Python and JavaScript through labs and coursework. Evaluate assignments, projects, and lab work to provide constructive feedback.
Contributed to the design and development of IBFD's Tax Research Platform, collaborating with international teams.
Improved platform accessibility in compliance with WCAG 2.2 AA standards.
Worked closely with back-end developers to design and develop RESTful APIs for front-end integration.
Led junior developers, ensured end-to-end application maintenance, and conducted R&D for feature enhancements.
Designed and developed three Angular-based client applications, including two for a financial platform.
Collaborated with back-end engineers to design and integrate APIs for seamless front-end functionality.
Mentored junior developers on front-end technologies and software development best practices.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to develop new features and resolve existing system issues.
Led the development of key functionalities including audio/video calling, dental module integration, and dynamic prescription design.
Conducted research and feasibility analysis to identify optimal implementation strategies.
